◎译　　名　莫妮卡,永不满足的荡妇 / Les cuisses de Monique / Monika - kyltymätön erotomaani / Mónica, una cachonda insaciable

◎简　　介  

　　Monique, a young woman who gave up her medicine studies, falls in love with a photographer and then turns away from him because of his unsteadiness and marries an erotic film maker. But the wedding does not last and she returns to the photographer.by:yuankan.cc
trans_title: 莫妮卡,永不满足的荡妇
